chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Applications 341 & 352 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2123/2019 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.2124/2019 03.11.2025 Mr. Fahad Hussain Areejo, advocate for the applicant Learned counsel for the applicant does not press these reference applications which are dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
